title: Kamgar Ayuktalay Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 78 Accountant, Inspector and More Posts
shortInfo: Kamgar Ayuktalay has published the Group C Posts Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 78 Group C Posts positions. Candidates within the age range of 19 to 38 years and holding a Graduate degree from a recognized university or equivalent qualification, along with post-wise required experience and typing qualifications, are eligible to apply online at Kamgar Ayuktalay Official Website. The application process will be active from 13-05-2026 to 11-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

basic_details.job_title: Kamgar Ayuktalay Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 78 Accountant, Inspector and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Kamgar Ayuktalay has published the Group C Posts Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 78 Group C Posts positions. Candidates within the age range of 19 to 38 years and holding a Graduate degree from a recognized university or equivalent qualification, along with post-wise required experience and typing qualifications, are eligible to apply online at Kamgar Ayuktalay Official Website. The application process will be active from 13-05-2026 to 11-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: Up to 43 years for reserved categories, ex-servicemen, sports persons, PWD, project affected, earthquake affected, graduate part-time employees; additional relaxation as per rules for specific categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from recognized university or equivalent, For Accountant: Commerce Graduate + 3 years experience, Marathi language knowledge, Typing qualification for Lower Division Typist: English and Marathi shorthand 80 wpm, Marathi typing 30 wpm, English typing 40 wpm
qualification.details: Inspector: Graduate from recognized university or equivalent qualification recognized by Maharashtra Government. Accountant: Graduate in Commerce from statutory university and minimum 3 years experience in accounts field. Lower Division Typist: Graduate from recognized university or equivalent qualification recognized by Maharashtra Government. General: Knowledge of Marathi language. Lower Division Typist Specific: English and Marathi shorthand 80 wpm, Marathi typing 30 wpm, English typing 40 wpm.

salary_details.details: Inspector: S-13: Rs. 35400-112400 + Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per rules Accountant: S-13: Rs. 35400-112400 + Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per rules Lower Division Typist: S-8: Rs. 25500-81100 + Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per rules

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kamgar Ayuktalay Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kamgar Ayuktalay to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kamgar Ayuktalay Group C posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Kamgar Ayuktalay Group C posts is 11 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Group C posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 78 vacancies announced for various Group C posts by Kamgar Ayuktalay.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for applying to these posts is 19 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Kamgar Ayuktalay Group C recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for general category candidates is 38 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is 1000.

faq.question: Q6. Which posts are included in the Group C recruitment?
faq.answer: The Group C posts include Inspector, Accountant, and Lower Division Typist.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: For the Accountant post, candidates must be a Commerce Graduate with a minimum of 3 years of experience in the accounts field.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Inspector post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Inspector post is S-13, ranging from Rs. 35400 to Rs. 112400 per month, plus allowances.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection methods for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include a Written Test and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
